groups.name: Materials
groups.hint: Assign, textures, palette laydown, smart import

tools.name: execute_maxscript
tools.description: Execute arbitrary MAXScript code in 3ds Max and return the result.

tools.name: chat_clear
tools.description: Drop the in-Max chat's conversation history.

tools.name: chat_reload
tools.description: Re-read local chat config and environment without restarting Max.

tools.name: chat_status
tools.description: Report the in-Max standalone chat status (visible/configured/model).

tools.name: send_to_chat
tools.description: Send a message to the in-Max standalone chat (WIP) and block until the turn completes.

tools.name: invoke_tool
tools.description: Invoke any registered MCP tool inside 3ds Max via the native bridge.

tools.name: run_tool_smoke
tools.description: Run generated live smoke cases against the native bridge inside 3ds Max.

tools.name: add_controller_target
tools.description: Add a node variable or constraint target to an existing controller.

tools.name: assign_controller
tools.description: Create and assign a controller to a sub-anim track.

tools.name: get_wired_params
tools.description: Show existing wire connections on an object.

tools.name: inspect_controller
tools.description: Inspect the controller on a specific sub-anim track.

tools.name: inspect_track_view
tools.description: Inspect an object's controller/track tree in a Track View-style hierarchy.

tools.name: list_wireable_params
tools.description: Discover sub-anim parameters on an object that can be wired.

tools.name: set_controller_props
tools.description: Modify script text or properties on an existing controller.

tools.name: unwire_params
tools.description: Disconnect a wired parameter.

tools.name: wire_params
tools.description: Connect parameters between objects with a wire expression.

tools.name: batch_file_info
tools.description: Read metadata from multiple .max files in a single call.

tools.name: inspect_max_file
tools.description: Inspect an external .max file without opening it.

tools.name: merge_from_file
tools.description: Merge objects from an external .max file into the current scene.

tools.name: search_max_files
tools.description: Search .max files in a folder for objects matching a name pattern.

tools.name: learn_scene_patterns
tools.description: Analyze the current scene to learn real-world class usage patterns.

tools.name: map_class_relationships
tools.description: Map which classes can reference which types via their ParamBlock2 params.

tools.name: walk_references
tools.description: Walk the full reference dependency graph of a scene object.

tools.name: watch_scene
tools.description: Live scene event watcher — track what happens in 3ds Max in real-time.

tools.name: inspect_modifier_properties
tools.description: Inspect all properties of a specific modifier on an object.

tools.name: inspect_object
tools.description: Get comprehensive properties of an object for exploration.

tools.name: inspect_properties
tools.description: Deep-inspect all properties of an object, modifier, base object, or material.

tools.name: introspect_osl
tools.description: Inspect the API surface of any material, texturemap, or modifier class.

tools.name: discover_plugin_classes
tools.description: Enumerate ALL registered classes in 3ds Max's DLL directory via native C++ SDK.

tools.name: discover_plugin_surface
tools.description: Discover plugin-related classes and summarize likely entry points.

tools.name: get_plugin_manifest
tools.description: Return a structured plugin manifest derived from live runtime data plus curated hints.

tools.name: inspect_plugin_class
tools.description: Inspect a plugin class using runtime class scans plus showClass reflection.

tools.name: inspect_plugin_constructor
tools.description: Return likely creation notes for a plugin class.

tools.name: inspect_plugin_instance
tools.description: Inspect a live scene instance with plugin-aware summarization.

tools.name: introspect_class
tools.description: Deep C++ SDK introspection of a class — returns the COMPLETE API surface.

tools.name: introspect_instance
tools.description: Deep C++ SDK introspection of a live scene object with actual values.

tools.name: list_plugin_classes
tools.description: List classes likely tied to a plugin or superclass family.

tools.name: refresh_plugin_manifest
tools.description: Refresh and return the plugin manifest.

tools.name: assign_material
tools.description: Create a material and assign it to one or more objects.

tools.name: batch_replace_materials
tools.description: Replace multiple materials in a single operation.

tools.name: create_material_from_textures
tools.description: Create a fully-wired PBR material from a folder of texture maps.

tools.name: create_shell_material
tools.description: Wrap render + export materials in a Shell Material (dual pipeline).

tools.name: create_texture_map
tools.description: Create a texture map and store it as a MAXScript global variable.

tools.name: get_material_slots
tools.description: Get compact material slot/property info without schema caches.

tools.name: get_materials
tools.description: List all materials assigned to objects in the current 3ds Max scene.

tools.name: palette_laydown
tools.description: Lay down folder textures into Compact Material Editor palette slots.

tools.name: replace_material
tools.description: Replace one material with another across all objects that use it.

tools.name: set_material_properties
tools.description: Set multiple properties on an object's material in a single call.

tools.name: set_material_property
tools.description: Set a property on an object's material (or sub-material).

tools.name: set_sub_material
tools.description: Create or assign a sub-material in a Multi/Sub-Object material slot.

tools.name: set_texture_map_properties
tools.description: Set properties on a texture map stored as a MAXScript global variable.

tools.name: write_osl_shader
tools.description: Write an OSL shader to disk and create an OSLMap from it.

tools.name: smart_import
tools.description: Batch-import 3D meshes from a folder, auto-assigning materials by stem matching.

tools.name: add_modifier
tools.description: Add a modifier to an object.

tools.name: collapse_modifier_stack
tools.description: Collapse the modifier stack on an object.

tools.name: make_modifier_unique
tools.description: Make an instanced modifier unique (de-instance it).

tools.name: remove_modifier
tools.description: Remove a modifier from an object by name.

tools.name: set_modifier_property
tools.description: Set a modifier parameter on one object or many.

tools.name: set_modifier_state
tools.description: Set the enable state of a modifier with viewport/render granularity.

tools.name: analyze_node_orientation
tools.description: Inspect world-space orientation, pivots, bounding boxes, and local axes for scene nodes.

tools.name: batch_rename_objects
tools.description: Rename multiple objects in a single batch operation.

tools.name: clone_objects
tools.description: Clone (copy/instance/reference) objects in the scene.

tools.name: create_object
tools.description: Create a geometry object with spatial placement feedback.

tools.name: delete_objects
tools.description: Delete objects from the 3ds Max scene by name.

tools.name: get_hierarchy
tools.description: Get the hierarchy tree of an object (recursive children).

tools.name: get_object_properties
tools.description: Get detailed properties of a named object in the 3ds Max scene.

tools.name: isolate_and_capture_selected
tools.description: Capture isolated viewport screenshots of each selected object (resolves to top-level parents).

tools.name: select_objects
tools.description: Select objects in the 3ds Max scene.

tools.name: set_object_property
tools.description: Set a property on a named object in the 3ds Max scene.

tools.name: set_parent
tools.description: Parent or unparent objects in the 3ds Max scene.

tools.name: set_visibility
tools.description: Show, hide, freeze, or unfreeze objects.

tools.name: transform_object
tools.description: Move, rotate, and/or scale an object by the given offsets.

tools.name: manage_groups
tools.description: Manage object groups — create, ungroup, open, close, attach, detach.

tools.name: manage_layers
tools.description: Manage scene layers — create, delete, list, set properties, move objects.

tools.name: manage_selection_sets
tools.description: Manage named selection sets — create, delete, list, select, replace.

tools.name: get_dependencies
tools.description: Trace the reference graph for an object using refs.dependents / refs.dependentnodes.

tools.name: get_instances
tools.description: Get all instances (copies sharing the same base object) of a scene object.

tools.name: manage_scene
tools.description: Manage the 3ds Max scene state.

tools.name: query_scene
tools.description: Unified scene query. action: overview | filter | class | property | selection | delta.

tools.name: get_bridge_status
tools.description: Ping the MCP bridge for protocol/transport metadata. Use when diagnosing connection errors, not as a session preamble.

tools.name: get_plugin_capabilities
tools.description: Get 3ds Max version, available renderers, installed plugins, and class counts.

tools.name: get_session_context
tools.description: Bundle bridge, capabilities, scene, and selection when broad live context is needed—not before every task.

tools.name: add_data_channel
tools.description: Append operators to a Data Channel modifier's internal stack.

tools.name: add_dc_script_operator
tools.description: Add a MAXScript operator to a Data Channel modifier's internal stack.

tools.name: inspect_data_channel
tools.description: Inspect a Data Channel modifier's operator graph.

tools.name: list_dc_presets
tools.description: List all available Data Channel modifier presets.

tools.name: load_dc_preset
tools.description: Load a Data Channel preset into the object's DC modifier internal stack.

tools.name: set_data_channel_operator
tools.description: Set properties on a specific operator in a Data Channel modifier.

tools.name: delete_effect
tools.description: Delete an atmospheric or render effect by index.

tools.name: get_effects
tools.description: List all atmospheric effects and render effects in the scene.

tools.name: toggle_effect
tools.description: Enable or disable an atmospheric or render effect by index.

tools.name: build_floor_plan
tools.description: Build a 2D floor plan from grid-based room definitions.

tools.name: get_railclone_style_graph
tools.description: Read RailClone style-editor graph data from exposed arrays/interfaces.

tools.name: scatter_forest_pack
tools.description: Create a Forest Pack scatter object and wire surfaces + source geometry.

tools.name: get_camera_sequence
tools.description: Get only the camera-assigned State Sets, sorted by start frame.

tools.name: get_state_sets
tools.description: Get all State Sets with their camera assignments and frame ranges.

tools.name: add_tyflow_collision
tools.description: Add/configure Collision operator and wire collider node list.

tools.name: add_tyflow_event
tools.description: Add one event to an existing tyFlow object.

tools.name: connect_tyflow_events
tools.description: Connect events with Send Out by applying common destination property candidates.

tools.name: create_tyflow
tools.description: Create tyFlow with one event and a configurable operator list.

tools.name: create_tyflow_preset
tools.description: Create common tyFlow presets: rain, snow, fountain, burst, debris.

tools.name: get_tyflow_info
tools.description: Inspect a tyFlow object with deep flow/event/operator/property readback.

tools.name: get_tyflow_particle_count
tools.description: Return tyFlow particle count at current frame or supplied frame.

tools.name: get_tyflow_particles
tools.description: Return particle data rows from tyFlow read-only APIs.

tools.name: list_tyflow_operator_types
tools.description: Return available and unavailable tyFlow operator names for this installation.

tools.name: modify_tyflow_operator
tools.description: Set operator properties on an existing tyFlow event/operator pair.

tools.name: remove_tyflow_element
tools.description: Remove operator from an event, or remove event when operator_name is empty.

tools.name: reset_tyflow_simulation
tools.description: Reset simulation for one tyFlow object or for all tyFlow objects.

tools.name: set_tyflow_physx
tools.description: Set object-level PhysX settings from tyFlow object properties.

tools.name: set_tyflow_shape
tools.description: Set Shape operator with validated 3D shape IDs.

tools.name: render_scene
tools.description: Render the current viewport in 3ds Max.

tools.name: capture_multi_view
tools.description: Capture multiple viewport angles and stitch into a single labeled grid image.

tools.name: capture_screen
tools.description: Capture fullscreen only when explicitly enabled.

tools.name: capture_viewport
tools.description: Capture the current 3ds Max viewport and return it as an image.
